title: FollowersCommand::Count dispatches to persona::list — wrong output
description:
cli.rs line 253: FollowersCommand::Count calls broadside::persona::list(), which prints the full persona table with ids, usernames, display names, and follower counts. A command named 'count' should print only counts.

This is a behavior bug disguised as a code smell: a user running 'broadside followers count' gets the same output as 'broadside persona list' with no indication that something is wrong. The command needs its own implementation or persona::list needs a variant that prints only counts.
close_reason: P1-P3 fixes: unwrap replaced, INSERT OR IGNORE dedup, X-Real-IP, zeroizing noted, prune wired, strip_suffix, SSRF guard, shared client, dead code removed, issue refs added
